About.title: About Our Factory
About.description: Zhiyuan Safety Shoes: Your Trusted Partner for Safety Footwear. Founded in 1990, we are a professional manufacturer dedicated to R&D, production, and sales of labor protection shoes.

BrandStory.label: Our Story
BrandStory.title: Your Trusted Partner for Safety Footwear
BrandStory.p1: Founded in 1990, Zhiyuan Safety Shoes is a professional manufacturer and supplier dedicated to the R&D, production, and sales of labor protection shoes. With 30 years of focused experience, we have established ourselves as a reliable name in the industry, driven by the mission "Safety is our mission."
BrandStory.p2: Equipped with 8 efficient production lines (including 6 injection lines and 2 semi-automatic lines for high-end products), our factory boasts an annual output of 2 million pairs, supported by a team of over 200 professionals. We adhere to strict quality control, featuring advanced testing equipment to ensure all products meet functional standards.
BrandStory.p3: Widely applied in smelting, chemical industry, construction, machinery manufacturing, railways, and shipping, our products have gained trust globally. We serve clients across Europe, Southeast Asia, South America, Africa, and Russia, while maintaining solid partnerships with domestic listed companies. Committed to sincerity and quality, Zhiyuan Safety Shoes strives to be your reliable supplier and service provider.

founded.title: Factory Founded
founded.desc: Established in Gaomi, Shandong, dedicated to labor protection footwear for domestic and international markets.

expansion.title: Going Global
expansion.desc: Expanded exports to Southeast Asia, Europe, South America, Africa, and Russia.

certification.title: Quality Certification
certification.desc: Achieved ISO 9001 / 14001 / 45001 (CQM / IQNET) for the factory and EU PPE CE type-examination (TÜV Rheinland, EN ISO 20345) for applicable footwear models.

global.title: Global Scale
global.desc: 8 production lines, 2 million pairs annual output, 200+ professionals, serving clients worldwide.

GlobalFootprint.title: Built for the World
GlobalFootprint.subtitle: Our footprint spans over 50 countries, providing customized solutions for different regional climates and working environments.

europe.title: S3 Eco-Friendly Safety Boot
europe.desc: Flagship series developed for a renowned German construction firm, meeting strict S3 safety standards while using eco-friendly recyclable materials.
europe.challenge: Meeting S3 waterproof ratings and REACH environmental regulations while keeping weight down.
europe.solution: Developed new eco-microfiber leather with German waterproof membrane, passing all tests.

usa.title: Lightweight Logistics Shoe
usa.desc: Designed for warehouse environments like Amazon, focusing on solving foot fatigue from long hours of walking.
usa.challenge: Workers walk over 20k steps daily; traditional steel toes were too heavy and rigid.
usa.solution: Used Nano-carbon toe cap replacing steel, paired with high-rebound EVA midsole, reducing weight by 40%.

middleEast.title: Heat Resistant Oil Field Boot
middleEast.desc: Designed for extreme desert oil field environments, featuring superior heat resistance and sand protection.
middleEast.challenge: Ground temperatures can reach 70°C, with corrosive oil presence.
middleEast.solution: Developed 300°C heat-resistant rubber outsole formula and designed a sand-proof bellow tongue structure.

Certifications.standardsDesc: Our products are engineered and tested to meet and exceed safety regulations in major global markets, ensuring protection in any environment.

sb.title: Basic Safety (SB)
sb.desc: Equipped with 200J impact-resistant toe cap. Suitable for light industry with no puncture risks.

s1.title: Anti-Static (S1/S1P)
s1.desc: Adds closed heel energy absorption and anti-static properties. S1P adds puncture resistance.

s3.title: Full Protection (S3)
s3.desc: Includes penetration-resistant midsole, water-resistant upper, and cleated outsole. Top choice for construction.

astm.title: USA ASTM F2413
astm.desc: Covers M/I/C (Impact/Compression), EH (Electrical Hazard), and SD (Static Dissipative) ratings.

Certifications.label: Certifications
Certifications.title: Internationally
Certifications.description: A complete certification system is the passport to international markets, and a strong endorsement of our commitment to every worker's safety.

gb.desc: China national mandatory standard, issued by CNCA-recognized lab, China market access.

en.desc: EU PPE CE via TÜV Rheinland type-examination (EN ISO 20345). Protection classes (e.g. S1–S3) depend on each model’s certificate scope.

ansi.desc: North America market access, equivalent to ASTM F2413, meets US/Canada import requirements.

iso.desc: Quality management system covering full supply chain, third-party annual audit, continuous improvement.

Certifications.metricsDescription: These numbers are not just marketing slogans—they are real records accumulated over 30 years from every order and quality inspection.

documents.title: Official certificates
documents.subtitle: Third-party documentation (CQM / IQNET, TÜV notified body for EU PPE).
documents.disclosure: Images are representative. Certification scope may apply to specific models or series; EU Type-Examination validity depends on renewal. Request current documents and applicable scope from sales before purchase or resale.

eu_ce.alt: TÜV Rheinland EU Type-Examination certificate for safety footwear under PPE regulation

Hero.title: 5 Million Pairs
Hero.description: Your reliable global OEM/ODM partner. Precision-engineered safety footwear built for international industrial standards.

slide1.title: Protection Without The Weight
slide1.description: Metal-free composite toe protection. 30% lighter than traditional boots, perfect for airport security and electricians.

slide2.title: Standards You Can Trust.
slide2.description: Every pair meets or exceeds international safety standards. Lab-tested for impact, compression, and slip resistance.

slide3.title: From Blueprint to Reality.
slide3.description: In-house R&D and 7-day rapid prototyping. We provide comprehensive customization from upper design and material selection to custom outsole molding.

slides.alt1: Hero banner — factory or product scene (slide 1)

WhyChooseUs.title: Professional Manufacturing,
WhyChooseUs.subtitle: Quality Assured
WhyChooseUs.label: Why Choose Zhiyuan
WhyChooseUs.description: From raw material incoming to finished product outgoing, every step undergoes strict quality control. We are not middlemen—we are true manufacturers, which means you get the best results in quality and price.

certification.title: Dual International Certification
certification.desc: Products are engineered to China GB 12011 and EU EN ISO 20345; EU CE marking applies where a valid type-examination covers the model. Always confirm scope on your certificate pack.

manufacturing.title: Full-Link In-House Manufacturing
manufacturing.desc: Own last, injection, vulcanization, and upper sewing workshops. Full control, stable quality, traceable, guaranteed delivery.

customization.title: Deep OEM/ODM Customization
customization.desc: Support last development, fabric color matching, logo embroidery to packaging integration. Standard sample lead time 7-15 work days.

quality.title: In-House Test Lab
quality.desc: In-house lab for steel toe, puncture, and electrical tests; each batch ships with an inspection report. Third-party test reports (e.g. SGS, Intertek) can be arranged on request.

flexibility.title: Flexible MOQ & Stocking
flexibility.desc: Min 500 pairs per style, support multi-style mixed orders. Big clients can sign annual framework agreements for tiered discounts.

logistics.title: Global Fast Shipping
logistics.desc: Long-term cooperation with DHL, MSC, COSCO. Support FOB/CIF/DDP trade terms, covering 50+ countries and regions.

ProductionProcess.label: Production Process
ProductionProcess.title: From Order to
ProductionProcess.description: Every pair of safety shoes represents a precision industrial system. Standardized processes ensure consistent quality per batch with guaranteed delivery.

demand.title: Protection Level & Scenario Analysis
demand.desc: Engineers deeply understand the usage environment, precisely match protection standards and material selection, and issue selection proposals.

sample.title: 3D Modeling + Rapid Sampling
sample.desc: CAD last design, deliver standard samples within 7-15 work days, proceed to mold opening after confirmation.

material.title: Quality Raw Material Traceability
material.desc: Premium steel toe caps, puncture-resistant plates, leather uppers tested for REACH/RoHS compliance.

manufacturing.title: Automated Upper & Vulcanization
manufacturing.desc: German Desma injection molding equipment, PU+rubber dual-density one-step forming, 99%+ yield rate.

testing.title: 200+ Process Inspections
testing.desc: IPQC in-process inspection + FQC final inspection, each batch with shipment report; accredited third-party testing can be arranged on request.

delivery.title: Global Logistics Seamless
delivery.desc: FOB/CIF/DDP multiple options, professional customs and logistics tracking, ensure safe and timely arrival.

HomeOemCta.title: Private label & custom programs
HomeOemCta.desc: Tooling, materials, and packaging aligned to your brand—with clear lead times and batch flexibility.

ProductCategories.title: Professional Safety Footwear

FAQ.label: Common Questions
FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our manufacturing and ordering process.
FAQ.contactDesc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our friendly team.

cta.title: Let's Build Your Safety Footwear Brand Together
cta.desc: Our engineers are ready to review your specs. Get a free consultation and quote within 24 hours.

moq.a: Our standard MOQ is 500 pairs per style. For first-time orders, we can discuss smaller trial quantities.

leadTime.q: What is the production lead time?
leadTime.a: Standard lead time is 35-45 days after deposit and sample confirmation.

customization.q: Can you put my logo on the shoes?
customization.a: Yes, we offer full OEM/ODM services including logo on tongue, side, insole, and custom box design.

certifications.q: What safety certifications do you have?
certifications.a: Our factory holds ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 (CQM / IQNET). EU market footwear is supported by TÜV Rheinland EU type-examination under EN ISO 20345 where listed on the certificate. North American orders can be built to ASTM F2413 or CSA Z195 with supporting lab reports when specified—we do not claim one certificate covers every SKU.

samples.a: We provide samples for quality checking. Sample fee is required but will be 100% refunded when you place the bulk order.

payment.q: What payment terms do you accept?
payment.a: We accept T/T (30% deposit, 70% before shipment) and L/C at sight for large orders. For small sample payments, PayPal is available.

shipping.a: Yes, we can arrange FOB, CIF, or DDP shipping terms. We work with reliable freight forwarders to deliver goods to your designated port or warehouse.

visit.a: Absolutely. We welcome clients to visit our facility in Gaomi, China. We can arrange airport pickup from Qingdao Liuting International Airport.

Footer.about: Zhiyuan Safety Shoes: Your Trusted Partner for Safety Footwear. Founded in 1990, we are a professional manufacturer of labor protection shoes with 30 years of experience and an annual output of 2 million pairs.

ProductsPage.description: Browse our complete collection of certified industrial safety footwear. Use the filters to find the perfect match for your workplace requirements.

ProductGrid.noProductsDesc: Please check back later or contact us for catalog.

hero.title: Your Brand.
hero.description: Scale your footwear business with a trusted manufacturing partner. We turn your concepts into certified, market-ready products with speed and precision.

hotspots.upperMaterialDesc: Full grain leather, suede, or breathable microfiber mesh.
hotspots.outsoleTechDesc: Dual-density PU/PU or Rubber. Oil & Slip resistant (SRC).

cooperation.title: Flexible Cooperation Models
cooperation.subtitle: Choose the level of customization that fits your business stage.

CustomizationOptions.title: Total Customization Freedom
CustomizationOptions.description: Don't settle for generic off-the-shelf products. We give you full control over every detail of your safety footwear, ensuring it meets your specific market demands and price points.

logoBranding.title: Logo & Branding
logoBranding.desc: Your brand, front and center. We offer various logo applications.

materialsColors.title: Materials & Colors
materialsColors.desc: Choose from our premium library of leathers and textiles.

soleTech.title: Sole Technology
soleTech.desc: Select the right outsole for your market's terrain.

packaging.title: Packaging
packaging.desc: Retail-ready presentation that stands out on the shelf.

InteractiveOemCase.title: Inside the Process:
InteractiveOemCase.summary: A 6-month journey from a rough sketch to 50,000 pairs delivered. Solving the challenge of extreme heat resistance and metatarsal protection.

design.label: Consultation
design.title: Translating Requirements into Blueprints
design.desc: The client needed a boot that could withstand 300°C surfaces and 200J impacts. Our R&D team spent 3 days analyzing the mining terrain in Pilbara. We proposed a hybrid Kevlar-Leather upper design that reduced weight by 15% without compromising safety.
design.quote: The 3D rendering was spot on. They understood our safety needs better than we did.

mold.label: Design & CAD
mold.title: Precision Tooling for Custom Outsoles
mold.desc: To ensure maximum grip on loose gravel, we opened a new dual-density PU/Rubber mold. The tread pattern was engineered with self-cleaning channels. The mold opening took just 12 days, 30% faster than industry average.
mold.quote: Fastest mold opening we've seen in 10 years of sourcing.

sample.label: Prototyping
sample.title: From Digital to Physical
sample.desc: First samples were produced within 7 days. We identified a potential pressure point on the ankle and adjusted the collar padding density immediately. The second version (V2) was approved instantly for lab testing.
sample.quote: V2 sample fit perfectly. The comfort level was beyond expectation.

test.label: Mass Production
test.title: Rigorous ISO 20345 Validation
test.desc: Every batch underwent 15 critical tests in our in-house lab: Impact resistance, Antistatic discharge, and Flexing durability (50,000 cycles). Third-party verification from accredited labs can be arranged for your order when required.
test.quote: Having an in-house lab saved us weeks of waiting for 3rd party reports.

delivery.label: Global Delivery
delivery.title: On-Time Delivery, Every Time
delivery.desc: Production lines ran at full capacity. We implemented a 5-checkpoint QC system. The final container was loaded with custom retail packaging, barcoded for their warehouse system, and shipped FOB Qingdao.
delivery.quote: Goods arrived in perfect condition. Packaging was retail-ready as promised.

socialProof.author: A. Becker

specs.title: Full Specifications
specs.subtitle: Professional buyers reference
specs.colorsDefault: Black, Brown, Navy, Orange (custom on request)

safety.title: Protection That Complies
safety.desc1: Toe cap and midsole meet EN ISO 20345 impact and compression requirements.
safety.desc2: Reduces risk of workplace injury and supports your compliance documentation.

comfort.title: All-Day Comfort
comfort.desc1: Ergonomic design and cushioning for long shifts.
comfort.desc2: Helps reduce fatigue and improves worker acceptance of PPE.

durability.title: Built to Last
durability.desc1: Quality materials and construction for repeated use.
durability.desc2: Lower cost per wear for your procurement budget.

compliance.title: Certification Ready
compliance.desc1: Test reports and certificates available for EU, NA, and other markets.

grip.title: Slip & Oil Resistance
grip.desc1: Outsole designed for SRC or higher slip/oil resistance where specified.
grip.desc2: Suitable for workshops, warehouses, and industrial floors.

breathability.title: Breathable Lining
breathability.desc1: Moisture-wicking lining where applicable for warmer environments.
breathability.desc2: Better hygiene and comfort in demanding conditions.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.subtitle: B2B trust & market access
certifications.ce: CE marked — legal for sale in the EEA.
certifications.en20345: EN ISO 20345 — European safety footwear standard.
certifications.meaning: EU CE and EN ISO 20345 apply to models covered by type-examination; factory QMS supports consistent production. For the US/Canada or other markets, request the test pack that matches your SKU.

Construction.pain: Heavy objects, sharp debris, uneven terrain.
Construction.solution: Steel or composite toe, puncture-resistant sole, ankle support. This model meets typical site requirements.

Logistics.pain: Long hours on hard floors, forklift traffic, shifting loads.
Logistics.solution: Lightweight design, slip-resistant outsole, cushioning. Reduces fatigue and slip incidents.

Oil & Gas.solution: Oil-resistant outsole, optional HRO/heat resistance. Suitable for refinery and field use.

Food.pain: Wet, slippery, hygiene and washdown requirements.
Food.solution: Easy-clean materials, slip resistance, compliance with food-sector PPE policies.

Food Industry.pain: Wet, slippery, hygiene and washdown requirements.
Food Industry.solution: Easy-clean materials, slip resistance, compliance with food-sector PPE policies.

Mining.pain: Abrasion, impact, sometimes water and mud.
Mining.solution: Robust upper and sole, optional waterproof (S3). Built for harsh underground or open-pit conditions.

Chemical.solution: Chemical-resistant materials, ESD where required. Supports lab and plant safety.

Executive.pain: Professional image plus basic site or warehouse protection.
Executive.solution: Low-cut or sporty style with safety toe. Office-to-site versatility.

Forestry.pain: Chainsaw hazards, uneven terrain, mud, and moisture in woodland work.
Forestry.solution: Robust upper and sole, slip resistance, ankle support; specify cut protection class where required.

oem.title: OEM / Customization
oem.subtitle: Factory direct — your brand, your specs
oem.intro: We support OEM and private-label orders. Customize the following to match your brand and market:
oem.color: Colors & materials (from our range or custom)
oem.material: Material swaps (e.g. full grain, nubuck, mesh)
oem.privateLabel: Private label — no factory branding on product

moq.q: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
moq.a: MOQ varies by model; typical range 300–500 pairs per style. We can discuss lower trial orders for established partners.

samples.q: Can I order samples before bulk order?
samples.a: Yes. Sample orders are available. Lead time and cost depend on stock; we will confirm upon inquiry.

leadTime.q: What is the lead time for production and delivery?
leadTime.a: Standard lead time is about 30–45 days ex-works after order confirmation. FOB/delivery terms and quantity may affect timing.

certDocs.q: Are test reports and certificates provided?
certDocs.a: Yes. We provide CE documentation and EN ISO test reports for models in scope, factory ISO certificates (9001/14001/45001), and can arrange third-party reports (e.g. SGS, Intertek) when your tender requires them.

payment.q: What payment terms do you accept?
payment.a: We accept T/T, L/C, and other terms for B2B orders. Specific terms are confirmed with your quote.

audit.q: Can we visit the factory or arrange an audit?
audit.a: Yes. We welcome factory visits and can support third-party audits. Contact us to schedule.

cta.formDesc: Get a customized quote. Our team will reply within 24 hours.

descriptionSection.title: Product Description
descriptionSection.factoryLine: Zhiyuan factory direct — EN ISO 20345 compliant production, QC and certification support for B2B buyers.

HomeMeta.title: Zhiyuan · Safety Shoes
HomeMeta.description: Zhiyuan Safety Shoes: Professional manufacturer of labor protection shoes since 1990. 8 production lines, 2M pairs annual output. OEM/ODM available.

Testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
Testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it. Here's what industry leaders say about our safety footwear solutions.
Testimonials.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of satisfied customers who trust us for their safety footwear needs.

1.name: Michael Rodriguez
1.content: SafeStep boots have been our go-to choice for over 3 years. The quality is exceptional and our workers love the comfort. We've seen a significant reduction in foot injuries since switching to SafeStep.

2.name: Sarah Chen
2.content: Outstanding customer service and fast delivery. The custom OEM solution they provided exceeded our expectations. Their team worked closely with us to develop exactly what we needed.

3.name: David Thompson
3.content: Best safety footwear we've used. The slip-resistant technology has significantly reduced workplace accidents. The boots are comfortable for 12-hour shifts and hold up well in harsh conditions.

TechnicalMatrix.title: Technical Matrix
TechnicalMatrix.subtitle: Precision engineered safety solutions for global industry.

Manufacturing.subtitle: Manufacturing Power
Manufacturing.title: Precision
Manufacturing.desc1: With over two decades of specialized experience in safety footwear, our manufacturing facility stands as a benchmark of industrial excellence. We don't just assemble shoes; we engineer protection.
Manufacturing.desc2: Our 12 fully automated production lines integrate the latest injection technology and robotic precision, ensuring that every pair meets the exact specifications required for high-risk industrial environments. From material sourcing to final stress testing, our in-house laboratory monitors every stage of the lifecycle.

GlobalReach.subtitle: Global Scale
GlobalReach.title: Exporting
GlobalReach.desc: From our centralized manufacturing hub, we power industrial safety across 6 continents. Our scale is built on consistent quality and a robust international supply chain.

TechnicalOEM.subtitle: Engineering Core
TechnicalOEM.title: Technical
TechnicalOEM.desc: Our OEM capability is rooted in our mastery of core components. We manufacture our own safety elements to ensure total quality control.
